text: Every small business owner I know is drowning in repetitive tasks. Email follow-ups. Scheduling. Lead routing. They're paying someone $40/hour to do what an AI workflow handles in seconds. Built Flowmatic to close that gap. AI automation done-for-you, not do-it-yourself.
